sections.name: What is Minecraft?
sentences: Minecraft is a video game where the world is made of blocks.
You can build, explore, and survive in this world.
The game is made by Mojang Studios.
You can play on your computer or phone.
There are many game modes to choose from.
You can play alone or with friends.
The game is very creative and fun.
Over 300 million people have bought Minecraft.

sections.name: How to Play
sentences: You use tools to break blocks.
You collect wood, stone, and other materials.
You craft new tools and items.
You build houses and structures with blocks.
You must eat food to stay alive.
At night, monsters come out.
You can explore caves and find treasures.
The goal is to survive and have fun.

sections.name: Game Modes
sentences: Survival mode is where you must stay alive.
You need to find food and build shelter.
Creative mode gives you unlimited blocks.
You can fly and build anything in Creative mode.
Hardcore mode is very hard. You only have one life.
Adventure mode is for special maps made by other players.

sections.name: Basic Tools
sentences: A pickaxe is for breaking stone and ores.
An axe is for cutting trees and wood.
A shovel is for digging dirt and sand.
A sword is for fighting monsters.
A crafting table lets you make new items.
